expected_answer:
# Statute-to-facts application

The notice rule likely applies because the customer prepaid more than $8250, the service cannot be performed within 30 days, and the vendor knows it cannot staff the workshop for 45 days. The vendor should send written cancellation notice within 5 business days.
expected_points: written notice due within 5 business days
